problem.title: Reverse a Queue Using Stack
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Given a queue of integers, reverse the queue using a stack.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Second line contains N space-separated integers

Output Format:
- Print the reversed queue

Example:
Input:
5
10 20 30 40 50

Output:
50 40 30 20 10

solution.explanation: Read the queue into an array, push all elements onto a stack, then pop them to print in reverse order.
